title: rich crunchy turkish cod kebabs
description: festival-worthy turkish dish featuring cod in a rich and crunchy coating, ideal for special occasions
instructions: in a shallow dish, mix together chickpea flour, parmesan cheese, cumin, paprika, and garlic.
in a separate dish, whisk together lemon juice and olive oil.
dip each cod fillet into the lemon-herb mixture, coating both sides evenly.
dip the coated cod fillet into the chickpea flour mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
place the coated cod fillet on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
repeat the process for the remaining cod fillets.
bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
while the cod is baking, toast the chickpea flour mixture in a small skillet over medium heat.
fluff the toasted chickpea flour mixture with a fork and set aside.
to serve, place the cooked cod on a bed of iceberg lettuce, top with toasted chickpea flour mixture, and serve immediately.
